cards.summary: The market is routing the event through no stable support anchor, while XLE Energy Equity Response, Broad Dollar Index (FRED), and High-Yield Spread (FRED) are fighting that transmission. Current posture: pressure-led.
Defense is being traded through r1, Vz, and r5, while MFI is trying to turn that move into settled accumulation. Current posture: support-led.
The market is underwriting megacap sponsorship mainly through NVDA OBp, AAPL OBp, and MSFT OBp, while GOOGL OBp is the main name resisting that bid. Current posture: pressure-led.
The tape is being pressured by MFI, r5, and sigma15, while OBp is absorbing that strain. Current posture: mixed-rotating.
